courses.title: Git & GitHub Bootcamp
courses.description: Go from zero to GitHub Pro in 7 days. Master version control, branching, pull requests, open source collaboration, and more — all with hands-on practice.

videos.title: Day 1 — Why Devs Need Git
videos.description: Setup & Concepts. Understand what Git is, why every developer needs it, and get your environment ready with git init.

videos.title: Day 2 — Your First Commits
videos.description: Track Changes. Learn how to stage and commit changes, understand the commit history, and use git commit like a pro.

videos.title: Day 3 — Push Your Code Live
videos.description: GitHub Upload. Connect your local repo to GitHub and push your code live with git push.

videos.title: Day 4 — Branching Like a Pro
videos.description: Parallel Work. Create and manage branches to work on features independently using git branch.

videos.title: Day 5 — Pull Requests & Open Source
videos.description: Team Workflow. Learn how to fork repos, raise pull requests, and contribute to open source projects.

videos.title: Day 6 — GitHub Profile
videos.description: Portfolio + Pages. Build a standout GitHub profile with a README.md and host your portfolio using GitHub Pages.

videos.title: Day 7 — Final Project
videos.description: Get Certified. Put everything together in a final project using git merge and complete the bootcamp.
